use_cases: Displaying course progress with visual progress bars and completion percentages
Showing course design metadata including title, description, and timeline
Rendering team member avatars for collaborative course development
Presenting countdown timers for course deadlines or launch dates
Organizing multiple course cards in a grid or list layout
ai_summary: A reusable course design card component for displaying educational content progress, featuring a clean card layout with title, description, progress bar, participant avatars, and countdown timer. Built with TypeScript and styled using Tailwind CSS for modern, responsive design suitable for learning management systems and educational platforms.
